title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their companies have adopted AI coding tools at scale. Topics include workflow changes across the software development lifecycle, productivity measurement approaches, and the shift in how developers allocate time between coding and other tasks.
